goal: Add a side-effect-free application preflight builder that validates release-governance approved-action consume authorization is ready for later application while keeping action consume, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action consume authorization can be preflighted for later application without applying it.
Application ref, operator ref, and application policy ref are required.
Action consume, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action consumption, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing application ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-122 recorded side-effect-free release-governance approved-action consume authorization without consuming the action.
